title: Doctor Warning Issue Sweep
findings: 已扫 existing registry（含 ISS-20260609-001..059）、fabric-doctor.txt、dirty-files、packages/docs/.claude/.codex 范围。新增 3 个低危：SKILL description lint 的 CRLF false positive、retired archive-hint orphan hook 造成不可修复 parity warning、fabric-archive canonical SKILL 超过 doctor token budget。跳过 events ledger/KB summary/store scope 等本机维护或已登记根因。
issues_found: [{"title":"Doctor skill description lint treats CRLF SKILL frontmatter as missing","severity":"low","description":"fabric-doctor reports fabric-archive/fabric-review/fabric-import as missing YAML frontmatter even though the installed and packaged SKILL.md files start with frontmatter bytes `---\\r\\nname:`. The lint uses an LF-only regex, unlike neighboring doctor frontmatter parsers that accept `\\r?\\n`, so Windows-normalized CRLF skill files become deterministic false positives for skill_description_quality.","location":"packages/server/src/services/doctor.ts:2646; packages/cli/templates/skills/fabric-archive/SKILL.md:1","fix_direction":"Change inspectSkillDescription to use the shared CRLF/BOM-tolerant frontmatter regex (`/^(?:\\uFEFF)?---\\r?\\n([\\s\\S]*?)\\r?\\n---/u`) and add CRLF SKILL.md regression coverage for description lint.","affected_components":["fabric doctor","skill_description_quality","installed Fabric skills","Windows/CRLF skill files"],"tags":["doctor-warning-issues","crlf","skill-description","false-positive"]},{"title":"Retired archive-hint hook files keep doctor hook parity warnings alive","severity":"low","description":"hooks_content_drift scans every `.cjs` basename present in client hook directories and compares same-name files across clients. The repo still has retired `.claude/hooks/archive-hint.cjs` and `.codex/hooks/archive-hint.cjs` with different contents, while the install path only sweeps archive-hint config entries and validates current fabric-hint hooks. Doctor therefore warns on an unconfigured legacy file, and its suggested `fabric install` remediation may not clear the warning.","location":"packages/server/src/services/doctor.ts:4017; packages/cli/src/install/skills-and-hooks.ts:1595; .claude/hooks/archive-hint.cjs:1; .codex/hooks/archive-hint.cjs:1","fix_direction":"Either delete legacy archive-hint.cjs files during install/uninstall/migration, or make hooks_content_drift ignore retired basenames unless they are still referenced by client hook config. Add a regression where stale archive-hint files remain on disk but no config points to them.","affected_components":["fabric doctor","hooks_content_drift","fabric install hook migration",".claude/.codex hook directories"],"tags":["doctor-warning-issues","hook-drift","legacy-hook","migration-tail"]},{"title":"Canonical fabric-archive SKILL exceeds the doctor hot-path token budget","severity":"low","description":"fabric-doctor reports fabric-archive at 5721 estimated tokens, and the packaged template plus installed copies are 17162 chars / 171 lines. This is not just local state: packages/cli/templates/skills/fabric-archive/SKILL.md ships the over-budget hot-path body, so fresh installs inherit the warning and extra model-load cost.","location":"packages/cli/templates/skills/fabric-archive/SKILL.md:1; .claude/skills/fabric-archive/SKILL.md:1; .codex/skills/fabric-archive/SKILL.md:1","fix_direction":"Move detailed phase mechanics, examples, and long MUST/NEVER catalogues into ref/ files and leave SKILL.md with the trigger gate plus concise phase index. Keep token-budget CI/doctor coverage on the canonical template, not only installed copies.","affected_components":["fabric-archive skill","packages/cli/templates/skills","skill_token_budget_exceeded","progressive disclosure"],"tags":["doctor-warning-issues","skill-token-budget","progressive-disclosure","template-size"]}]
